title: squash, layers: never use build cache when computing last step of last stage
body:
When using `--squash` with `--layes` last step of a squashed build produces 
a layer which contains contents from other layers as well. So last step of last 
stage should be always computed and never fetched from build cache, while 
other steps and stages don't have this restriction.
